sources.text: Chlodwig I wird Weihnachten 497, 498 oder 499 durch Bischof Remigius von Reims getauft Seine 2.Gemhalin Chrodihild hat ihre beiden älteren Söhne schon vorher taufen lassen
sources.note: Clovis I was baptized by Bishop Remigius of Reims on Christmas Day in either 497, 498, or 499. His second wife, Chrodihild, had already had her two eldest sons baptized prior to this.
